allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: Go boilerplate with clean architecture

Features:
- Environment-based configuration \(dev/staging/production\)
- JWT authentication with refresh tokens
- Translation service with Google API integration
- PostgreSQL with GORM
- Fiber HTTP server
- Centralized DTO package with ToResponse\(\) pattern
- Async job context helpers \(pkg/asynctx\)
- Comprehensive error handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
refactor: Apply SOLID/KISS/YAGNI principles across codebase

Major architectural improvements:
- DI container uses interfaces \(proper DIP\)
- Consistent error handling with repo.ErrNotFound sentinel
- Simplified DTO structure \(3-layer: request/response, removed output layer\)
- Real health checks: /readyz now pings DB
- Config validation for production environment

Code cleanup \(YAGNI\):
- Removed unused TranslationHistory entity
- Removed unused repo methods \(Update, Delete, DeleteExpired\)
- Consolidated duplicate request types \(handlers use DTOs directly\)
- Fixed table name from ''history'' to ''translations''

Bug fixes:
- Added missing validation to Logout handler
- Fixed Makefile swag path

Improvements:
- Added JSON wrapper convenience functions \(pkg/json\)
- Worker now uses pkg/json consistently
- Added handler test example
- Added CLAUDE.md documentation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
